'''鈭歵-k-n''' ('''katakan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zoomorphise|zoomorphise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zoomorphise|zoomorphise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-k-n
|-
! Lemma
| katakan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitakan|thitakan]] || [[word:jitakan|jitakan]] || [[word:shitakan|shitakan]] || [[word:kitakan|kitakan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutakan|thuthutakan]] || [[word:jujutakan|jujutakan]] || [[word:shushutakan|shushutakan]] || [[word:kukutakan|kukutakan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutakan|thutakan]] || [[word:jutakan|jutakan]] || [[word:shutakan|shutakan]] || [[word:kutakan|kutakan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutakan|thutakan]] || [[word:jutakan|jutakan]] || [[word:shutakan|shutakan]] || [[word:kutakan|kutakan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetakan|thetakan]] || [[word:jetakan|jetakan]] || [[word:shetakan|shetakan]] || [[word:ketakan|ketakan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotakan|thothotakan]] || [[word:jojotakan|jojotakan]] || [[word:shoshotakan|shoshotakan]] || [[word:kokotakan|kokotakan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotakan|thotakan]] || [[word:jotakan|jotakan]] || [[word:shotakan|shotakan]] || [[word:kotakan|kotakan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotakan|thotakan]] || [[word:jotakan|jotakan]] || [[word:shotakan|shotakan]] || [[word:kotakan|kotakan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:takan|takan]] || [[word:takan|takan]] || [[word:takan|takan]] || [[word:takan|takan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:takan|takan]] || [[word:takan|takan]] || [[word:takan|takan]] || [[word:takan|takan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:takan|takan]] || [[word:takan|takan]] || [[word:takan|takan]] || [[word:takan|takan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:takan|takan]] || [[word:takan|takan]] || [[word:takan|takan]] || [[word:takan|takan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙takan|th忙takan]] || [[word:j忙takan|j忙takan]] || [[word:sh忙takan|sh忙takan]] || [[word:k忙takan|k忙takan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatakan|thathatakan]] || [[word:jajatakan|jajatakan]] || [[word:shashatakan|shashatakan]] || [[word:kakatakan|kakatakan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatakan|thatakan]] || [[word:jatakan|jatakan]] || [[word:shatakan|shatakan]] || [[word:katakan|katakan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatakan|thatakan]] || [[word:jatakan|jatakan]] || [[word:shatakan|shatakan]] || [[word:katakan|katakan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatakan|shatakan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatakan|goshatakan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatakan|gokishatakan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatakann眉|shatakann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatakannkn眉|goshatakannkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatakann眉|gokishatakann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatakansh毛|shatakansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatakannksh毛|goshatakannksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatakansh毛|gokishatakansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatakanro|shatakanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatakannkro|goshatakannkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatakanro|gokishatakanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatakanmu|shatakanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatakannkmu|goshatakannkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatakanmu|gokishatakanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatakansher|shatakansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatakannksher|goshatakannksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatakansher|gokishatakansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatakanng|shatakanng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatakannkng|goshatakannkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatakanng|gokishatakanng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatakanya|shatakanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatakannkya|goshatakannkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatakanya|gokishatakanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatakanyam|shatakanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatakannkyam|goshatakannkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatakanyam|gokishatakanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatakann眉sh毛|shatakann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatakannkn眉sh毛|goshatakannkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatakann眉sh毛|gokishatakann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatakann眉ro|shatakann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatakannkn眉ro|goshatakannkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatakann眉ro|gokishatakann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatakann眉mu|shatakann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatakannkn眉mu|goshatakannkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatakann眉mu|gokishatakann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatakansh毛n眉|shatakansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatakannksh毛n眉|goshatakannksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatakansh毛n眉|gokishatakansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatakansh毛ro|shatakansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatakannksh毛ro|goshatakannksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatakansh毛ro|gokishatakansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatakansh毛mu|shatakansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatakannksh毛mu|goshatakannksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatakansh毛mu|gokishatakansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatakanron眉|shatakanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatakannkron眉|goshatakannkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatakanron眉|gokishatakanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatakanrosh毛|shatakanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatakannkrosh毛|goshatakannkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatakanrosh毛|gokishatakanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatakanromu|shatakanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatakannkromu|goshatakannkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatakanromu|gokishatakanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatakanmun眉|shatakanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatakannkmun眉|goshatakannkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatakanmun眉|gokishatakanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatakanmush毛|shatakanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatakannkmush毛|goshatakannkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatakanmush毛|gokishatakanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatakanmuro|shatakanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatakannkmuro|goshatakannkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatakanmuro|gokishatakanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
